cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: AgriSec combines offline retrieval-augmented generation with agriculture-specific English and Hausa knowledge so farmers can receive source-backed crop, pest, fertilizer, livestock, and post-harvest guidance on budget laptops.

test_prompts.prompt: A smallholder farmer in northern Nigeria is growing maize on poor soil. Give practical fertilizer and soil management advice.
Manomi ya ga kwari suna cin ganyen masara. Ka ba shi shawarwari a Hausa game da yadda zai gane da kuma rage fall armyworm.

model.name: Qwen2.5 1.5B Instruct
model.runtime: llama.cpp GGUF for ADTC profiler; Ollama for the AgriSec application runtime
